headline: Assessing Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) Valuation After A Year Of Share Price Weakness And Recent Momentum
summary: Recent performance snapshot Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) has seen mixed share performance recently, with the stock down over the past day and week, while showing gains over the past month and the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Zebra Technologies. Putting this in context, Zebra Technologies has fallen over the year, with the 1 year total shareholder return down 21.41%, even as the 3 month share price return of 8.57% hints at improving short term momentum around the current US$232.11...
